title: session-mining aggregated report
description: Output of aggregate.py: many contributors' reports merged into one cross-contributor view. This document is ITSELF a valid input to aggregate.py (the merge is associative), so it carries the per-pattern `contributors` counts and the novel promotion/quarantine buckets needed to re-aggregate without loss.

vocab_version.description: single version if all inputs agreed, else the array of versions seen (a mixed-version merge)

contributors.description: total contributing reports represented (sum of inputs' weights)

reports_merged.description: number of input files merged in this run

novel_promotion_candidates.description: novel clusters corroborated by >= promote_min_contributors distinct contributors

novel_quarantine.description: novel clusters below the promotion threshold; contribute nothing to cataloged counts

contributors.description: sum of contributing reports for this id (carried so re-aggregation stays exact)
